title: Wire up an EventEmitter
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This module is supposed to react to a `ping` event, but it never creates an emitter, never registers a listener, and never emits.

Use the `events` module: create an `EventEmitter`, register a handler with `.on('ping', ...)`, and trigger it with `.emit('ping')`.
objectives: Register a listener with `.on(...)` and fire it with `.emit(...)`
hints: `const { EventEmitter } = require('events');` then `const bus = new EventEmitter();`.
